01 / About

Built on experience.
Driven by precision.

Family-owned and operated, Cedar Steel is backed by more than 30 years of industry experience, supported by a practical understanding of project requirements from design through to installation.

With a reputation for precision, responsiveness and reliable delivery, we provide a full-service steel solution across design, drafting, fabrication, surface treatment, delivery and on-site installation — trusted by builders, architects and developers across NSW.

Full-service capability

Steel Fabrication
Structural Steel Design
Welding Services
3D Drafting & Detailing
Delivery & On-site Installation
Robotic Plasma Coping
Surface Treatment
Technical Design Support
Shop Drawings & Erection Plans
48-Hour Residential Turnaround
02 / Capabilities

End-to-end steel fabrication.

Custom design and fabrication for residential, commercial and industrial projects — supported by advanced 3D technology across detailing, drafting, fabrication, surface treatment, delivery and installation.

01 — Design

Planning, Drafting & Design

Advanced 3D drafting that improves coordination, clarity and buildability at every stage of delivery.

  • Detailed drawings for all components
  • Shop drawings & erection plans
  • 3D sketch templates for RFIs
  • Isometric details for complex connections
02 — Fabricate

Supply & Fabrication

In-house fabrication of structural steel, with a focus on accuracy, efficiency and installation readiness.

  • Universal beams & columns
  • Hollow sections — SHS, RHS & CHS
  • Angles, flat bars & cleats
  • Australian-sourced steel & reliable supply
03 — Protect

Surface Treatment

Protective coating solutions matched to project requirements, environment and durability needs.

  • Zinc phosphate primer for corrosion protection
  • Powder coating — UV & scratch resistance
  • Hot dip galvanising for harsh environments
  • Hot zinc spray for added longevity
04 — Install

Delivery & Installation

From packing and transport through to on-site installation, we manage the final stage with safety and control.

  • Packing & transport managed in-house
  • On-site installation by our own crews
  • Sequenced to your erection program
  • Safety-led, professional execution
03 / Our Difference

Confidence from
design to delivery.

From technical support and drafting through to fabrication, delivery and on-site installation, Cedar Steel brings the capability, responsiveness and reliability projects depend on.

◆ 01

Proven Industry Expertise

Backed by more than 30 years of industry experience, we understand the technical, practical and delivery demands behind every project.

◆ 02

Advanced Fabrication Technology

Robotic plasma coping technology supports greater cutting precision, consistency and efficiency across fabrication.

◆ 03

End-to-End Delivery

From technical support and 3D drafting through to fabrication and installation, we manage the full steel scope with clarity and control.

◆ 04

Tailored Project Solutions

We tailor our service approach to suit project scope, programme, build methodology and site conditions.

04 / Projects

Delivered across NSW.

Structural steel solutions for every scale — from custom homes to commercial and industrial builds, with a focus on accuracy, buildability and site readiness.

Residential

Structural steel for custom homes, extensions and residential builds — delivered with speed, accuracy and site readiness.

Commercial

Commercial steel solutions delivered with a focus on coordination, buildability and dependable project execution.

Industrial

Industrial steel designed for demanding environments, practical buildability and efficient installation.
